1481:
WITH yearly_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
lowest_consumption_per_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM yearly_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
),
lowest_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        yc.CustomerID,
        yc.Segment,
        yc.total_consumption
    FROM yearly_consumption yc
    JOIN lowest_consumption_per_segment lcp ON yc.Segment = lcp.Segment AND yc.total_consumption = lcp.min_consumption
),
annual_average AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        AVG(total_consumption) AS annual_avg
    FROM yearly_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    'SME vs LAM' AS comparison,
    aa1.annual_avg - aa2.annual_avg AS difference
FROM annual_average aa1
JOIN annual_average aa2 ON aa1.Segment = 'SME' AND aa2.Segment = 'LAM'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'LAM vs KAM' AS comparison,
    aa2.annual_avg - aa1.annual_avg AS difference
FROM annual_average aa1
JOIN annual_average aa2 ON aa1.Segment = 'LAM' AND aa2.Segment = 'KAM'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'KAM vs SME' AS comparison,
    aa2.annual_avg - aa1.annual_avg AS difference
FROM annual_average aa1
JOIN annual_average aa2 ON aa1.Segment = 'KAM' AND aa2.Segment = 'SME';

SELECT 
    l.Date AS last_lab_date,
    p.age_at_arrival
FROM (
    SELECT 
        p.ID,
        p."First Date",
        p.Birthday,
        CASE 
            WHEN (strftime('%Y', p."First Date") - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) > 0 
                 OR (strftime('%Y', p."First Date") = strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AND strftime('%m', p."First Date") > strftime('%m', p.Birthday)) 
            THEN (strftime('%Y', p."First Date") - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday))
            ELSE (strftime('%Y', p."First Date") - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - 1 
        END AS age_at_arrival
    FROM Patient p
    WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
) p
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        l.ID,
        l.Date AS lab_date
    FROM Laboratory l
    JOIN (
        SELECT 
            p.ID,
            p."First Date",
            p.Birthday,
            CASE 
                WHEN (strftime('%Y', p."First Date") - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) > 0 
                     OR (strftime('%Y', p."First Date") = strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AND strftime('%m', p."First Date") > strftime('%m', p.Birthday)) 
                THEN (strftime('%Y', p."First Date") - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday))
                ELSE (strftime('%Y', p."First Date") - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - 1 
            END AS age_at_arrival
        FROM Patient p
        WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
    ) p2 ON l.ID = p2.ID
    ORDER BY p2.age_at_arrival DESC
    LIMIT 1
) oldest ON l.ID = oldest.ID
ORDER BY oldest.age_at_arrival DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    mc.Diagnosis,
    mc.max_cnt
FROM (
    SELECT 
        dc.Diagnosis,
        MAX(dc.cnt) as max_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            e.ID,
            e.Diagnosis,
            COUNT(*) as cnt
        FROM Examination e
        INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID
        WHERE l.IGM <= 40 OR l.IGM >= 400
        GROUP BY e.ID, e.Diagnosis
    ) dc
    GROUP BY dc.Diagnosis
) mc
ORDER BY mc.max_cnt DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH top_teams AS (
    SELECT ta.team_api_id, ta.buildUpPlaySpeed, t.team_long_name, t.team_short_name
    FROM Team_Attributes ta
    JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
    ORDER BY ta.buildUpPlaySpeed DESC
    LIMIT 4
),
recent_matches AS (
    SELECT 
        m.home_team_api_id as team_api_id,
        m.date as match_date,
        m.home_team_goal,
        m.away_team_goal
    FROM Match m
    WHERE m.home_team_api_id IN (SELECT team_api_id FROM top_teams)
      OR m.away_team_api_id IN (SELECT team_api_id FROM top_teams)
    ORDER BY m.date DESC
)
SELECT 
    tt.team_long_name,
    tt.team_short_name,
    tt.buildUpPlaySpeed,
    rm.match_date,
    rm.home_team_goal,
    rm.away_team_goal
FROM top_teams tt
LEFT JOIN recent_matches rm ON tt.team_api_id = rm.team_api_id
ORDER BY tt.buildUpPlaySpeed DESC, rm.match_date DESC;

WITH player_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        p.id,
        p.height,
        AVG(pa.finishing) as avg_finishing
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    GROUP BY p.id, p.height
),
ranked_players AS (
    SELECT 
        height,
        avg_finishing,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC) as finishing_rank,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY height DESC) as height_rank,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY height ASC) as height_asc_rank
    FROM player_stats
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN height_rank = 1 AND height_asc_rank = 1 THEN 'highest'
        WHEN height_rank = 1 AND height_asc_rank > 1 THEN 'shortest'
        WHEN height_rank > 1 AND height_asc_rank = 1 THEN 'highest'
        WHEN height_rank > 1 AND height_asc_rank > 1 THEN 'shortest'
    END as result
FROM ranked_players
WHERE finishing_rank = 1
LIMIT 1;

WHERE l.date >= '1995-01-01'
  AND l.date <= '1997-12-31'
  AND l.amount >= 250000
  AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE';
138:
SELECT 
    c.gender,
    COUNT(*) AS male_clients
FROM district d
JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE d.A15 IN (
    SELECT A15 FROM district 
    ORDER BY A15 DESC 
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
)
GROUP BY c.gender;
129:
SELECT d.A2 
FROM trans t 
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id 
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id 
WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ' 
  AND t.operation = 'VYBER' 
  AND t.date LIKE '1996-01%' 
ORDER BY ABS(t.amount) DESC 
LIMIT 10;
152:
SELECT AVG(d.A15) as avg_crimes_1995
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE d.A15 > 4000
  AND strftime('%Y', a.date) >= '1997';
159:
SELECT DISTINCT t.trans_id 
FROM trans t 
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id 
JOIN client c ON a.district_id = c.district_id 
WHERE c.client_id = 3356 AND t.operation = 'VYBER';
169:
SELECT 
    ROUND((SUM(amount_1997) - SUM(amount_1996)) / SUM(amount_1996) * 100, 2) as growth_rate
FROM (
    SELECT 
        c1996.client_id,
        c1996.total_amount as amount_1996,
        c1997.total_amount as amount_1997
    FROM (
        SELECT c.client_id, SUM(l.amount) as total_amount
        FROM client c
        JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
        JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
        WHERE c.gender = 'M'
        AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996'
        GROUP BY c.client_id
    ) c1996
    JOIN (
        SELECT c.client_id, SUM(l.amount) as total_amount
        FROM client c
        JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
        JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
        WHERE c.gender = 'M'
        AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997'
        GROUP BY c.client_id
    ) c1997 ON c1996.client_id = c1997.client_id
);

186:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_male
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE';
194:
SELECT c.client_id, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m%d', 'now') < strftime('%m%d', c.birth_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';
